description: Spice up your style with this fashionable, and spacious wallet from fastrack. It's well organised to allow you to carry all your essentials conveniently and it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement.Dimensions : 9 cm x 12 cmMade of brown leatherOne main compartment zippered compartment with two insert pocketsOne more compartment with two insert pocketsThree card slots insideOne id card holder with meshThe flap has a clasp button closureContrast stitch detailing on the cover, with embossed brand name on the frontCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
